name: Green Bean/ Jicama Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Fresh green beans, blanched and shocked in cold water
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together dressing ingredients.
2. Toss the dressing with the other ingredients (green beans, jicama, red onion).
3. Chill at least 1 hour before serving, tossing again after 1/2 hour to help the marinating process.
